prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the room base, create a natural, realistic photo showing that this same room has become the hangout spot for exactly 3 20-year-old female university students. Keep the room layout, furniture, curtains, bed, TV, hanging clothes, storage drawers, lighting, and camera angle from REFERENCE_0 largely unchanged. Use REFERENCE_1 only as inspiration for adding a lived-in, casual hangout mess, but do not make the room dirty or rundown.

Add exactly 3 young women in casual Japanese school-uniform-inspired outfits: white shirts, dark plaid skirts, and ribbon ties. Placement: one sits on the left edge of the bed holding a canned drink, one sits cross-legged on the bed near the center holding a phone, and one sits in the foreground on the right side facing slightly toward the others while holding a canned drink. Make their faces anonymized/blurred with simple rectangular blur blocks.

Add casual party/snack items on the low black table: exactly 7 visible items — a large open snack bag, a cup noodle container, a paper plate, a canned drink, a small packaged snack, a blue tissue/snack box, and the existing remote/earbud-style small items. The scene should feel like friends chatting and snacking after school, candid smartphone photography, realistic indoor lighting, no dramatic styling, no text overlays, no extra people.
